untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition for 'two bottoms of approximately equal depth' requires specific swing point identification and depth comparison logic not available in the allowed indicator set. The pattern requires detecting local minima with similar values and measuring the highest high between them—this requires historical peak/trough detection beyond the scope of simple indicator-based conditions.
translation_notes: Approximated entry using Donchian Channel breakout (dc_upper) as proxy for 'breakout above highest high between bottoms' combined with volume confirmation (hvol_20). Exit uses Donchian lower band as reversal signal. Measure rule for target projection cannot be automated without custom pattern detection. Success rates from source: 78% (bull), 43% avg rise (right bottom heavier vol), 39% avg rise (left bottom heavier vol). Recommend manual pattern validation or custom pattern detector module.
